Meet Our Chef

Marcus Laurent

With over two decades of culinary excellence across the world's most prestigious kitchens, Chef Marcus brings a philosophy rooted in respect for ingredients and innovative technique.

His creations seamlessly blend classical French training with modern gastronomy, creating dishes that are both familiar and wonderfully surprising.

3

Michelin Stars

24

Years Experience

The Experience

Why Aurora

Exquisite Cuisine

Seasonal tasting menus crafted from the finest ingredients sourced globally.

Curated Wines

An award-winning wine program with over 500 labels from the world's top vineyards.

Private Dining

Intimate private dining experiences for celebrations, corporate events, and special occasions.
